name: TRICO BANCSHARES /
summary: PART I Overview TriCo Bancshares is a registered bank holding company under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHC Act). TriCo's principal business is to serve as the holding company for our wholly-owned subsidiary, Tri Counties Bank, a California-chartered commercial bank (the Bank). TriCo is a California corporation and was incorporated in 1981. Our common stock is traded on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the trading symbol "TCBK". The Company and the Bank are headqua...
